summary: Iteration 72: Share Estimate Link Feature - All 25 backend API tests passed. Comprehensive testing of share link creation, deactivation, stats, public view, and lead capture endpoints.
seed_data_creation: Test estimates and leads created during tests with TEST_ prefix, cleaned up after test class
context_for_next_testing_agent:
Iteration 72 verified Share Estimate Link feature. All 5 new endpoints working correctly:

1. POST /api/fee-calculator/share/{estimate_id} - Creates share token
   - Partner can share own estimate ✓
   - Admin can share any estimate ✓
   - Non-owner gets 403 ✓
   - Reuses existing token on update, updates expiry/settings ✓
   - Validates expiry_days (1-365) ✓

2. PUT /api/fee-calculator/share/{estimate_id}/deactivate
   - Owner can deactivate ✓
   - Admin can deactivate any ✓
   - Non-owner gets 403 ✓

3. GET /api/fee-calculator/share/{estimate_id}/stats
   - Returns view_count, lead_count, expires_at, active ✓
   - Owner/admin only (403 for others) ✓

4. GET /api/fee-calculator/public/{share_token} - NO AUTH
   - Returns estimate + branding without auth ✓
   - Increments view_count on each access ✓
   - Returns 404 if deactivated ✓
   - Returns 410 if expired (expiry logic verified) ✓

5. POST /api/fee-calculator/public/{share_token}/lead - NO AUTH
   - Creates lead with source='shared_fee_estimate' ✓
   - Sets assigned_to=owner, stage='new', tags=['fee-estimate-viewer'] ✓
   - Increments share_lead_count ✓
   - Creates notification for owner ✓
   - Returns 403 if allow_lead_capture=false ✓
   - Validates name & email required, phone & message optional ✓

Verified in MongoDB:
- Leads collection: 5 leads created with correct fields (source, stage, tags, assigned_to, priority='high')
- Notifications collection: Lead notifications created with type='lead', link='/partner?tab=lead-pipeline'

create_share_link_partner_own.details: Partner can create share link for own estimate

create_share_link_admin_any.details: Admin can share any estimate including partner's

create_share_link_non_owner_403.details: Case manager (non-owner, non-admin) gets 403 when trying to share partner's estimate

update_share_link_reuses_token.details: Updating share link reuses existing token but updates expiry and settings

deactivate_share_link_owner.details: Owner can deactivate their share link

deactivate_share_link_admin.details: Admin can deactivate any share link

get_share_stats_owner.details: Owner can get share stats (view_count, lead_count, expires_at, active)

get_share_stats_admin.details: Admin can get stats for any estimate

public_view_no_auth.details: Public endpoint returns estimate + branding without auth

public_view_increments_view_count.details: Each public view increments view_count (verified 3 views)

public_view_410_if_expired.details: Expiry logic exists and returns 410 for expired links

lead_capture_creates_lead.details: Lead capture creates lead with correct fields (source, stage, tags, assigned_to, priority)

lead_capture_creates_notification.details: Lead capture creates notification for owner with type='lead'

expiry_days_validation.details: Expiry days must be 1-365 (422 for 0 or 366)

mocked_apis.none: All APIs are real, no mocking
